title: astragalus incanus subsp. nummularioides
intro: Astragalus incanus subsp. nummularioides, also known as a species of flowering plant in the legume family, is a type of Astragalus plant that is native to certain regions of the world. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help to reduce stress and promote immune function. The health benefits of Astragalus incanus subsp. nummularioides are said to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
